title: Slapping Glove
description: This DataPack Lets You Slap Mobs Far Away.
body:
- **Slapping Glove Recipe : Four White Wool, One Wooden Shovel**
- **The Slap Power Limit For Now Is : 10**
- **This DataPack Lets You Slap Mobs Far Away, You Can Control The Power Of The Slap By Right Clicking With The Glove Selected In You Main Hand, You Can Scroll back by looking straight down And Right Clicking.**
 
- **Injoy Everyone :)**
- functions:
slapping:glove_give
